response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain knowledge, and SQL Server/Oracle expertise — all mandatory requirements. Their background is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with no evidence of financial systems development or Windows-based C++ work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot programming skills across multiple languages
Proven experience in CI/CD, testing practices, and open-source contributions
Excellent communication and teaching abilities demonstrated through workshops
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows platform (mandatory)
No exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
SQL experience is generic; no mention of SQL Server or Oracle as required
